name: Persimmon Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the salt, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs until foamy. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (persimmon pulp, vanilla) and blend until smooth.
5. Grease a 10 1/2 x 15 1/2 inch jelly roll pan or two greased 9 x 9 inch pans.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before frosting with a mixture of cream, powdered sugar, and margarine.
9. Sprinkle nuts over the cooled cookies if desired.
10. Cut into bars and serve.
